description.value:
A viscous, thin, gel-like explosive, which tends to cling to itself but not-so-much its surroundings. This allows it to be dumped down drains or other pipes, set into seams, run into crawlspaces, or used to give your cocktail a harsh but not altogether unpleasant acidic aftertaste.

Each instance of this item represents a 300ml vial, which can be further subdivided. Every 50ml deals 10 damage to objects, or 1d6 damage, when detonated, to a maximum of a 3m radius when all detonated at once. Ensuring it detonates properly requires a Demolitions check.

Detonating the explosive requires a @UUID[Compendium.night-city-gang-and-corp-mook-pack.NCGangsnCorpsItems22.Hat1nKbqvilFyvJ5]{Demolitionist's Toolkit}.
